text:
The department shall:

(1) place the principal and interest derived from a loan in a revolving loan fund; and

(2) administer the fund for future loans and their administration.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.104 — Revolving Loan Fund

The department shall:

    (1) place the principal and interest derived from a loan in a revolving loan fund; and

    (2) administer the fund for future loans and their administration.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

administer the fund for future loans and their administration.
